android_import_request_completion_consis.name: android_import_request_completion_consistent
android_import_request_completion_consis.value: ("android_import_request"."state" = 'processing' and "android_import_request"."result" is null and "android_import_request"."completed_at" is null) or ("android_import_request"."state" = 'completed' and "android_import_request"."result" is not null and "android_import_request"."completed_at" is not null)

goal_kind_distance_consistent.name: goal_kind_distance_consistent
goal_kind_distance_consistent.value: ("goal"."kind" = 'race' and "goal"."distance" is not null) or ("goal"."kind" = 'foundation' and "goal"."distance" is null)

plan_adjustment_active_decision_unique.name: plan_adjustment_active_decision_unique
plan_adjustment_active_decision_unique.where: "plan_adjustment"."trigger_type" = 'decision' and "plan_adjustment"."trigger_id" is not null and "plan_adjustment"."reversed_at" is null

training_plan_lifecycle_status_consisten.name: training_plan_lifecycle_status_consistent
training_plan_lifecycle_status_consisten.value:
(
				("training_plan"."status" in ('active', 'draft') and "training_plan"."archived_at" is null and "training_plan"."completed_at" is null and "training_plan"."lifecycle_reason" is null)
				or
				("training_plan"."status" = 'archived' and "training_plan"."archived_at" is not null and "training_plan"."lifecycle_reason" is not null)
			)

training_plan_completed_reason_consisten.name: training_plan_completed_reason_consistent
training_plan_completed_reason_consisten.value:
(
				("training_plan"."completed_at" is null and "training_plan"."lifecycle_reason" is distinct from 'completed')
				or
				("training_plan"."completed_at" is not null and "training_plan"."lifecycle_reason" = 'completed')
			)

training_plan_lifecycle_chronology.name: training_plan_lifecycle_chronology
training_plan_lifecycle_chronology.value: "training_plan"."completed_at" is null or "training_plan"."archived_at" is null or "training_plan"."completed_at" <= "training_plan"."archived_at"

workout_prescription_valid.name: workout_prescription_valid
workout_prescription_valid.value:
(
				("workout"."prescription_kind" = 'distance' and "workout"."target_distance_meters" > 0 and "workout"."target_duration_seconds" is null and "workout"."interval_structure" is null and "workout"."type" <> 'rest')
				or
				("workout"."prescription_kind" = 'timed' and "workout"."target_distance_meters" = 0 and "workout"."target_duration_seconds" > 0 and "workout"."interval_structure" is not null and "workout"."type" not in ('rest', 'race'))
				or
				("workout"."prescription_kind" = 'rest' and "workout"."target_distance_meters" = 0 and "workout"."target_duration_seconds" is null and "workout"."interval_structure" is null and "workout"."type" = 'rest')
			)
